name: AI Social Media Video Pipeline: Script, Voiceover and Publish with Claude and ElevenLabs

parameters.content:
## AI Social Media Video Pipeline using Claude and ElevenLabs

Stop recording, editing, and posting manually. This workflow takes any topic, idea, or trend as input and produces a finished short-form video -- with script, AI voiceover, and captions -- ready to publish to TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. Triggered manually, on a schedule, or from a Google Sheet of content ideas.

### How it works

1. The workflow is triggered via webhook, form, or schedule -- submit a topic and your brand settings and the pipeline starts automatically.
2. Claude Sonnet writes a tight 45-60 second video script structured for short-form: strong hook in the first 3 seconds, clear value in the middle, call to action at the end.
3. The script is sent to the ElevenLabs API to generate a natural-sounding voiceover MP3 in your chosen voice.
4. The voiceover and script are sent to the Creatomate API, which renders a complete video with animated captions, your brand colours, and optional B-roll or background visuals.
5. Creatomate returns a download URL for the finished video file once rendering is complete.
6. The final video is uploaded to Google Drive for storage and team access.
7. A Slack alert is sent with the video title, topic, and Google Drive link so your team knows it is ready to post.
8. Every video run is logged to Google Sheets with topic, script snippet, status, Drive link, and timestamp.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **Webhook or form trigger** -- Use the Form Trigger to submit topics manually, or replace it with a Schedule Trigger to pull topics automatically from a Google Sheet of content ideas.
- [ ] **Settings node** -- Open Configure Brand Settings and fill in your brand name, niche, target audience, tone of voice, ElevenLabs voice ID, Creatomate template ID, and output folder name. This is the only node you need to personalise.
- [ ] **Claude AI** -- Click the Claude Sonnet sub-node under Write Video Script, add a new Anthropic credential, and paste your API key from console.anthropic.com.
- [ ] **ElevenLabs** -- Get your API key from elevenlabs.io and add it to the Generate Voiceover node. Find your Voice ID in ElevenLabs under Voices -- copy the ID of the voice you want to use.
- [ ] **Creatomate** -- Sign up at creatomate.com and create a short-form video template. Add your API key and Template ID to the Render Video node. The template controls your visual style, fonts, and brand colours.
- [ ] **Google Drive** -- Connect your Google account in the Upload to Drive node. The video file will be saved to the folder name you set in the Settings node.
- [ ] **Slack** -- Connect your Slack account in Notify Team - Video Ready and set your channel. Right-click and Disable if unused.
- [ ] **Google Sheets** -- Create a sheet called Video Log with columns: Timestamp, Topic, Script Preview, Status, Drive Link, Duration. Connect your Google account in Log Video Run.
- [ ] Activate and submit your first topic via the form to test the full pipeline end to end.

### Customization

Replace the Form Trigger with a Schedule Trigger that pulls topics from a Google Sheet of ideas to run fully hands-free. Swap Creatomate for Shotstack or JSON2Video if you prefer a different renderer. Add a second branch after Upload to Drive to auto-post using the TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube API.

## Submit topic and configure brand

A form or webhook accepts your video topic and optional keywords. The Settings node holds all your brand config -- voice, tone, niche, template ID -- so you only edit one place.

## Write script with Claude AI

Claude Sonnet writes a 45-60 second short-form video script with a strong hook, clear value section, and call to action. Edit the prompt in this node to match your brand voice and content style.

## Generate voiceover with ElevenLabs

Sends the script to ElevenLabs and returns an MP3 voiceover file. Set your Voice ID in the Settings node. The audio URL is passed directly to the Creatomate renderer.

## Render video with Creatomate

Sends the voiceover URL and script to Creatomate, which renders the finished video using your template -- with animated captions, brand visuals, and the correct aspect ratio for short-form.

The node polls until rendering is complete before moving on.

## Store, alert and log

Uploads the finished video to Google Drive, sends your team a Slack alert with the Drive link, and logs the full run to Google Sheets. Right-click the Slack node and Disable if unused.

parameters.formDescription: Submit a topic and the pipeline will generate a ready-to-post video automatically.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert short-form video scriptwriter for {{ $json.platform }}.

BRAND: {{ $json.brand_name }}
NICHE: {{ $json.niche }}
AUDIENCE: {{ $json.target_audience }}
TONE: {{ $json.tone }}
TOPIC: {{ $json.topic }}
NOTES: {{ $json.notes }}
TARGET DURATION: {{ $json.duration_seconds }} seconds when spoken at a natural pace

Write a video script following this exact structure:

HOOK (first 3 seconds -- one punchy sentence that stops the scroll):
[hook line]

BODY (core value -- 3 to 4 short punchy points, each 1-2 sentences max):
[point 1]
[point 2]
[point 3]

CTA (last 3 seconds -- one clear action):
[call to action]

STRICT RULES:
- Write only the spoken words -- no stage directions, no camera notes, no emojis
- Each sentence should be short enough to read aloud in one breath
- Hook must create curiosity or state a bold claim
- No filler phrases like "in this video" or "make sure to like and subscribe"
- Total word count: 90 to 130 words for a 45-60 second video
- Match the tone exactly: {{ $json.tone }}

Output only the script with the section labels HOOK, BODY, CTA. Nothing else.
